warranty.summary: All mattresses come with a manufacturer warranty covering structural defects (sagging beyond acceptable limits, foam degradation, spring failure). Warranty years vary by product - see individual product listings.
warranty.exclusions: Warranty does not cover stains, physical damage, or normal wear from improper use (e.g. missing a proper bed frame/base).

delivery.summary: We deliver within Kathmandu Valley within 2-3 business days. Outside the valley, delivery takes 5-7 business days depending on location.
delivery.cost: Delivery is free within Kathmandu Valley for orders above Rs. 20,000. Outside the valley, delivery charges apply based on distance.

returns.summary: We offer a 7-day trial period from delivery date. If you're not satisfied, contact us within 7 days for a return or exchange.
returns.conditions: Mattress must be in original condition with protector on. Return shipping costs may apply.

payment.summary: We accept cash on delivery, bank transfer, and major mobile payment options (eSewa, Khalti).
payment.installments: Installment plans are available for orders above Rs. 25,000 - ask in store or via message.
